screening.selection_rule: Using deployment-visible public features and the frozen public probe panel only, select the first four seed/severity cases whose H2 effective fast Harness view retrieves level_shift_contrast_candidate.
screening.insufficient_support_rule: If fewer than four eligible cases are found in the frozen pool, stop as INCONCLUSIVE_APPLICABILITY_SUPPORT and do not expand or reorder the pool.

paired_evaluation.target_cases: the first four outcome-blind selected level-shift cases
paired_evaluation.risk_and_scope_cases: every other generated target and risk case belonging to the selected seeds
paired_evaluation.comparison: exact promoted H1 parent versus exact promoted H2 child, sharing one effective-request cache

data_separation.claim: Only the four selected cases from this new pool count as H2 held-out target evidence.

interpretation_limits: Success demonstrates conditional reuse of the scoped selection PATCH on new seeds matching the learned observable scope; it is not a population-wide accuracy claim.
Failure must be classified as applicability support, behavior transfer, value transfer, risk, scope, or infrastructure failure; thresholds cannot be changed afterward.
The held-out run cannot edit or further evolve the Harness.
